name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: ACE Cash Express Terrytown, Louisiana — ACE Cash Express offers payday loans, installment loans, and check cashing at 900+ U.S. locations. No credit sco...
description_long:
ACE Cash Express was founded in 1968 in Irving, Texas, making it one of the longest-operating alternative financial services companies in the United States. Now operating under parent company Populus Financial Group, Inc. — a corporate identity adopted in June 2019 — ACE has grown into the largest owner/operator of check cashing stores and the second-largest operator of short-term consumer loan stores in the country. With roughly 750–900 physical locations across 23 states and an active online platform, ACE holds an A+ rating from the Better Business Bureau and carries memberships with the Community Financial Services Association of America (CFSA) and the Online Lenders Alliance (OLA).

ACE's core product lineup centers on short-term consumer lending. Payday loans range from $50 to $715 in-store and $100 to $1,500 online — single-payment loans tied to the borrower's next paycheck, with no application fee and no credit score requirement. Installment loans allow multi-payment repayment and are available from $100 to $2,000 depending on the state. Title loans, secured by the borrower's vehicle, are offered in Arizona, Louisiana, Oregon, and Texas. Beyond lending, ACE cashes payroll, government, and tax refund checks (including types banks often refuse), offers MoneyGram wire transfers to 200+ countries, money orders, prepaid debit cards, bill payment, ATM access, and tax preparation at select locations. Customers can apply online, use the ACE Loans mobile app, or visit a retail store.

Several features distinguish ACE within the alternative lending space. Its nearly six-decade operating history reflects durability in a heavily regulated industry. The company's standout consumer protection is its 72-hour satisfaction guarantee: borrowers who return the full loan principal within 72 hours of funding — or by 5:00 PM CT on the third business day in AZ, FL, OH, and VA — owe zero fees or interest. Same-day funding is standard for qualified applicants. ACE also fills a genuine gap by cashing checks that traditional financial institutions frequently decline, a meaningful service for the unbanked and underbanked.

The primary limitation of ACE Cash Express — and the payday lending industry broadly — is cost. APRs on payday loans routinely exceed 300%, making these products extremely expensive if not repaid on schedule. ACE is not a tool for building credit, and its offerings are unsuitable for recurring financial needs or larger borrowing amounts. Geographic reach is limited to 23 states. Notably, California's Department of Financial Protection and Innovation (DFPI) has publicly documented enforcement action against parent company Populus Financial Group, a fact worth weighing for risk-conscious consumers. For borrowers facing a genuine, one-time cash shortfall who understand the cost structure, ACE offers speed, a broad retail footprint, and a satisfaction guarantee that most competitors do not match.

pricing.guarantee_details: 72-hour satisfaction guarantee: return the full loan principal within 72 hours of funding and pay nothing — no fees, no interest. In AZ, FL, OH, and VA, the deadline is 5:00 PM CT on the third business day after funding. Funds must be returned to the originating store.

tiers.name: Payday Loans
features: No credit score required to apply

tiers.name: Installment Loans
features: No credit score required to apply

tiers.name: Title Loans
features: Available in AZ, LA, OR, and TX only
No credit score required to apply

pros: Founded in 1968 — nearly six decades in operation, making it one of the oldest alternative lenders in the U.S.
Largest owner/operator of check cashing stores in the country, with 900+ locations across 23 states
No credit score required to apply for payday, installment, or title loans
72-hour satisfaction guarantee: return the full loan principal within 72 hours and owe nothing — fees included
Same-day funding available for qualified applicants at in-store and online locations
Cashes hard-to-cash checks (payroll, government, tax refund) that many banks and competitors refuse
MoneyGram wire transfers available in-store to the U.S. and 200+ countries
cons: Payday loan APRs typically exceed 300% — among the most expensive short-term borrowing options available to consumers
Service limited to 23 states, leaving borrowers in the remaining 27 states without access
Title loans available in only 4 states (AZ, LA, OR, TX), sharply limiting that product's reach
California DFPI has publicly documented an enforcement action against parent company Populus Financial Group
Loan repayment is generally not reported to major credit bureaus, so borrowing here does not help build credit history
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers who need immediate cash before their next paycheck
Individuals with poor or no credit history who cannot qualify for traditional bank or credit union loans
Customers needing same-day check cashing without an active bank account
Borrowers who want the ability to cancel a loan penalty-free within 72 hours if their situation changes
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is genuinely best suited for consumers facing a one-time, short-term cash shortfall who have no access to traditional credit and need funds the same day. Its 72-hour satisfaction guarantee adds a meaningful safety net absent from most competitors, but APRs routinely exceeding 300% make these products costly if not repaid on the original schedule — they are an emergency tool, not a long-term financial strategy.
services: Title Loans (AZ, LA, OR, TX — vehicle title as collateral)
Check Cashing (payroll, government, tax refund, and other check types)
Online Loan Applications and Real-Time Account Management
Mobile App — ACE Loans (loan applications, payment scheduling, store locator)
